fact_nuggets.text: Soul-Heart redirects here. For the ending theme to Volcanion and the Mechanical Marvel, see Soul-Heart (song). Soul-Heart (Japanese: Soul-Heart) is an Ability introduced in Generation VII. It is the signature Ability of Magearna.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Soul-Heart raises the user's Special Attack by one stage every time another Pokemon faints , which includes its allies and opponents. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Soul-Heart has no effect outside of battle.
In battle [ edit | edit source ] Soul-Heart raises the user's Special Attack by one stage every time another Pokemon faints , which includes its allies and opponents.
This Pokemon's Special Attack rises by one stage every time any Pokemon faints.
